description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in FTGate Technology (formerly known as Floosietek) FTGate 4.4 (Build 4.4.000 Oct 26 2005) allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML by sending (1) the href parameter to index.fts, or the param1 parameter to (2) /domains/index.fts, (3) /config/licence.fts, or (4) /config/systemacl.fts.
